manual.intro: It's okay if you're not good with computers. Just follow the steps 😊 — Just remember 3 things: ① Log in ② Explore ③ Buy and Sell
manual.title: Cafe.pi's Easy User Manual

steps: Global Marketplace: 200+ languages auto-translation · Pi simple payment · Chat, used goods, stores in one app · Connection by distance
'Siren Order' for all industries: Anyone can be a boss · Flexible menu · Instant notifications · O2O pickup
topics.title: Why Cafe.pi?

steps: EVENT #1: Charge with Test Pi and complete 10 missions, the first 100 people will receive 5,000 Bean
EVENT #2: Register your store and complete menu registration + transaction test, the first 100 stores will receive 10,000 Bean
In the Event tab, follow the participation link for each mission, and you can easily complete it
topics.title: Event — Participate now

steps: In Pi Browser, press 'Generate Connection Code', a 6-digit code will appear (Use within 10 minutes)
Copy the code (or link) and move it to a regular browser
In a regular browser, after Google login, paste it and press 'Connect', Pi + Google connection is complete
Pi Browser does not store information for security reasons, so the 6-digit code securely connects the two browsers
topics.title: Log in & Account Connection

steps: 1 Pi = 100 Bean (Platform-exclusive reward points) — You can start immediately with a free plan
Subscribe only to what you need: PiCafé™(Premium Cafe) · PiShop™(Product Registration) · PiTranslate™(Unlimited Translation)
Subscription fees are paid with charged Bean, and annual payment gives 2 months free
topics.title: Bean & Subscription

steps: Enter a Cafe room of your interest and start chatting for free
If you turn on 'Nearby Cafes', it shows nearby Cafes and neighbors by distance
With automatic simultaneous interpretation, you can chat with anyone in 200+ languages in your own language
topics.title: Cafe & Auto-translation

steps: If you upload product photos and price (Pi), it will be shown to people nearby with your location
View items available nearby by distance and if you like it, order with Pi
The paid Pi is temporarily and securely held by the platform (escrow), and transferred to the seller when the transaction is complete
topics.title: Used Marketplace (Secure Transaction)

steps: In 'Store Registration', if you set your store name and location, customers will find your nearby store
Register menu photos · price · quantity
When a customer orders, you receive an instant notification via Telegram (Menu · Quantity · Amount)
Hand over at the store in the order of Preparing → Ready → Pickup
topics.title: My Store (O2O)

steps: The Bean received from the current Testnet event is cafe.pi's promise
When the platform is officially launched on Mainnet and Bean Token is officially issued,
The event tokens earned on Testnet will be paid 1:1 as Mainnet Bean, as is
This is cafe.pi's principle to ensure that the efforts of early participants do not disappear
topics.title: Testnet Rewards, as is in Mainnet (Promise)

adminStats.scoreFormula: Puntuación = Días de actividad×0.2 + Content (Café·Publicaciones·Comentarios)×0.3 + Número de pagos×0.5
adminStats.subtitle: Usuarios activos · Estadísticas de ventas (basado en agregación diaria)

translate.costNote: El costo estimado es una estimación basada en el número de caracteres de la traducción (1 token ≈ 4 chars, asumiendo que los tokens de entrada ≈ salida×2) — Verifique la consola de Google AI Studio para el monto de facturación real.
translate.fetchFail: Fallo al recuperar estadísticas de traducción
translate.noData: No hay Data de traducción para el período.

whitepaper.footer: Meets Pi Network listing criteria (Login, Payment, Security, Data Standard).
whitepaper.highlight1Desc: Supports Pi Account + Google Account. Integrated Login for Kakao, LINE, WeChat, etc. will be added later.
whitepaper.highlight2Desc: Implementation of PiRC1 (Token Economy) · PiRC2 (Subscription Service) · PiRC3 (Escrow Secure Transaction).
whitepaper.intro: Cafe.pi structurally and cryptographically resolves the stringent constraints of Pi Browser, ensuring financial integrity and Data standards from its launch.
whitepaper.pillar1Desc: Supports Pi Account Login and Pi Payment as the primary method. Payments are made only with Pi, and Bean is a fixed internal reserve of 1 Pi = 100 Bean.
whitepaper.pillar2Desc: Even in Pi Browser, which does not store cookies, secure Login and Payment are enabled with token-based two-factor authentication. Client Gate design without infinite loops.
whitepaper.pillar3Desc: All transactions are recorded in an append-only ledger, and the accounting conservation identity (Issuance = Circulation + Recovery) is constantly verified. Over-issuance and double-spending are structurally impossible.
whitepaper.pillar3Title: 💰 Zero Tolerance for Financial Integrity Issues
whitepaper.pillar4Desc: Responds to KISA's 21 web vulnerability standards and defends against forgery, alteration, and timing attacks with HMAC-SHA256 signed tokens and constant-time comparison.
whitepaper.pillar5Desc: Applies K-DATA (Korea Data Agency) Data Standard from the first table and enforces it with automatic verification, ensuring long-term operational and audit reliability.
whitepaper.pillar6Desc: Provides fast initial screen and smooth usability through server-first rendering, parallel Data fetching, stale-while-revalidate caching, and location/search/bundle optimization.
whitepaper.title: Cafe.pi's Technical Strengths

items.a: In Pi Browser, tap 'Generate Link Code', then log in with Google in a regular browser and paste the code to link.
It is a platform-exclusive reserve. Charge 1 Pi = 100 Bean to use for subscriptions, gifts, etc., and it cannot be exchanged externally.
Pay with Pi in Pi Browser. Product transactions are protected by escrow (secure storage).
items.q: How do I make a payment?

items.a: Upon Mainnet official launch and Bean Token official issuance, Beans received from Testnet events will be paid 1:1 as is.
items.q: What happens to Beans received on Testnet?

items.a: It follows the refund and subscription withdrawal policy. For details, refer to the refund policy document below.
You can submit a report with a reason using the 'Report' button on posts, stores, etc. The operations team will review and take action.
It is used to show nearby cafes, stores, and products by distance. Consent can be withdrawn on My Page.

lbs.consentBenefit: If you agree, you can see nearby shops and chat rooms by distance.
lbs.consentCta: 📍 Agree to Location Service and Start
lbs.consentDesc: We collect location information to explore nearby products, shops, and chat rooms.
lbs.consentRequired: Exploring nearby requires location service consent.
lbs.nearbySubtitle: Find shops and chat rooms around me by distance.
lbs.optionalNotice: Even if you do not agree, there are no restrictions on using general services. Only location services will be deactivated.
lbs.purpose1: Search for nearby direct transaction products and shops, and display distance
lbs.purpose2: Explore nearby chat rooms and region-based community
lbs.purpose3: Prevention of unauthorized use and Service quality improvement
lbs.retentionDesc: Immediately discarded after purpose achievement. Immediately deleted upon withdrawal.
lbs.termsTitle: Términos de uso de los servicios basados en la ubicación
lbs.viewTerms: View full text of Location-based Service Terms of Use →

link.codeLabel: Linking Code (Enter in a regular browser)
link.desc: Link your Pi account with your Google account.
link.generateDesc: Press the button below to generate a 6-digit code. Access the /link page in a regular browser and enter the code to link your account.
link.googleLoginAndLink: Log in with Google and Link
link.googleLoginRequired: After entering the code, you will be redirected to the Google login screen.
link.inputDesc: Enter the 6-digit code generated on this page in the Pi Browser.
link.linkDone: Account linking complete! Redirecting to home…
link.linkedSuccess: Pi and Google accounts have been linked! Redirecting to Home…
link.needPiLogin: Pi login is required to generate a linking code.
link.title: Link Pi Account

lbs.historyDesc: Derecho de acceso del interesado según el Artículo 16 de la Ley de Información de Ubicación. Solo se muestran las unidades administrativas.
lbs.historyTitle: Historial de recopilación de mi ubicación
lbs.noHistory: No hay historial de ubicación recopilado.
lbs.revokeBtn: Revocar consentimiento (Eliminar información de ubicación inmediatamente)
lbs.revokeConfirm: Si revoca el consentimiento de los servicios de ubicación, la información de ubicación recopilada se eliminará inmediatamente. ¿Desea continuar?

subscr.cancelConfirm: If you cancel your subscription, auto-renewal will stop after use until the expiration date. Do you want to continue?
subscr.cancelOk: Your subscription has been canceled. You can use it until the expiration date.

subscrExtra.autoStopOnFail: La renovación automática se detendrá automáticamente incluso en caso de fallo de pago.
subscrExtra.cancelMethod: La cancelación es una forma de detener la renovación automática. Después de que finalice el período de suscripción actual, no se realizarán más pagos.
subscrExtra.confirmCancel: He confirmado la información. Cancelar suscripción
subscrExtra.noPartialRefund: No se ofrecen reembolsos parciales ni reembolsos por el período restante.
subscrExtra.noticeTitle: Aviso antes de cancelar la suscripción
subscrExtra.policyRef: Pi Network PiRC2 Política de cancelación y reembolso
subscrExtra.remainHint: El período restante se puede utilizar normalmente hasta la fecha de vencimiento.

telegram.botNotReady: The notification bot is still preparing. Please check again shortly.
telegram.desc: Since Pi Browser does not have its own notifications, Telegram notifications are recommended.
telegram.guideFooter: Once connected, you will receive Telegram notifications whenever a new order comes in. You can receive phone notifications even if the app is closed.
telegram.guideStep1: If you don't have the Telegram app on your phone, install it first. (Search for "Telegram" in App Store/Play Store)
telegram.guideStep2: When you press the "Open 📨 Telegram Bot to Connect" button above, Telegram will open.
telegram.guideStep3: Press the "Start" button at the bottom of the Telegram screen once.
telegram.guideStep4: Return to this screen and press "Confirm Connection" to complete! ✅
telegram.guideSummary: ❓ First time? See How to Connect
telegram.hint: After pressing "Start" in Telegram, please press "Confirm Connection" below.
telegram.title: 📨 Telegram Order Notifications

report.detailPlaceholder: Please describe the report in detail
report.duplicate: This item has already been reported.
report.title: Report

actionDone.complete: Transaction complete! Escrow Pi will be settled.
actionDone.confirm: Processed as delivery complete. Waiting for buyer's receipt confirmation.
actionDone.release: Receipt confirmed! Waiting for seller to complete the transaction.

bond.buyerNoticeBonded: 🛡️ Bonded Transaction: If cancelled after Escrow payment, the cancellation requester pays a 0.1π fee to the other party (seller receives 0.1π compensation if cancelled).
bond.buyerNoticeFree: Free Cancellation Transaction: No cancellation fee (seller not deposited — no cancellation compensation).
bond.depositSuccess: 1π deposit has been made (9 cancellation fees + 0.1π reserve fund).
bond.desc: Depositing 1π covers 9 cancellation fees — receive 0.1π compensation if buyer cancels.
bond.exhausted: Deposit exhausted — switching to no-deposit mode until additional 1π is deposited (no fee receipt).
bond.notice: 0.1π of the 1π deposit is a reserve fund and not used to cover fees. The refund function will be provided after legal review.
bond.title: Seller Bond

voiceTest.checkIce: — Obtención de dirección IP pública reflejada con el servidor STUN (si puede atravesar NAT)
voiceTest.checkMic: — Si el navegador soporta la API del Mic y obtiene una pista real
voiceTest.checkOpus: — Si soporta el Codec de voz de baja latencia (24~32kbps)
voiceTest.checkPeer: — Si el objeto de conexión P2P existe
voiceTest.deviceGuide1: Abra esta página en Pi Browser y, al presionar el botón, aparecerá una solicitud de permiso de micrófono.
voiceTest.deviceGuide2: Después de permitir, si todos los elementos están ✅
voiceTest.deviceGuide3: — se puede proceder con la implementación de llamadas de voz.
voiceTest.iosWarning: ⚠️ Si el Mic no funciona en iOS Pi Browser, es necesario revisar el elemento "Riesgos no resueltos" de la sección 10 del PRD
voiceTest.resultGo: 🎉 S0 GO — La implementación de llamada de voz 1:1 con WebRTC puede continuar
voiceTest.resultNoGo: 🚫 S0 NO-GO — Es necesario verificar los elementos fallidos (ver riesgos en la sección 10 del PRD)
voiceTest.skipped: Omitido debido a un fallo en la comprobación superior
voiceTest.subtitle: Diagnostica si WebRTC admite llamadas de voz en el dispositivo real de Pi Browser.
voiceTest.title: 🎙️ PiVoice™ S0 Spike
